THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT PEREDA, LOUIS TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT HIDAS, LES DBA ECONOMY ELECTRIC *** THE PROPOSAL SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF STATES "ANY CHANGE FROM THE ORIGINAL CONTRACT REQUIRES A SIGNED CHANGE ORDER". HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED NO SUCH CHANGE ORDER. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT TESTIFIED THAT ALL CONTRACTUAL FEES WERE PAID. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-01-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:10am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record, Dept. 525. Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Louis Pereda, appears in Pro Per. No appearance by Respondent, Les Hidas, dba Economy Electric. Mr. Perada, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative and responds to questions from Judge Myles.
10:16am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is marked or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-03-2009 Judgment Entered
